content.en:
Thundered!!!

The Black Decay Controller is constantly fighting with the Black Ancestor, and neither side can help the other.

And Ye Tian was watching from a distance, although the Dark Nest closed all time and space, the Eternal Controller of the outside world could not perceive the situation inside the Dark Nest.

However, Ye Tian's copying talent can still barely perceive it and know a little bit about the situation.

"It seems that Senior Brother Black Decay can't help Black Ancestor, but Senior Brother Black Immortal won't be in any danger!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After fighting for a while, the Black Decay Controller knew that he couldn't help the Black Ancestor, so he directly cast the Immortal Spear, tearing the Dark Lair and rushing out of the Dark Lair.

And the Black Ancestor didn't chase after him, because he also knew that he couldn't kill the Black Decay Master.

......

"Senior Brother Black Decay, are you okay?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's okay, but the strength of the Black Ancestor is indeed very strong, and I can't help him!" said the Black Decay Master.

"Black Ancestor's strength is indeed not weak!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Although he thinks that his strength is stronger than that of Heizu, it is unrealistic to want to kill Heizu at present.

Therefore, he did not make a move.

Shooting now is tantamount to making Heizu vigilant.

Subsequently, the Black Ruler went back and passed the news to the other Eternal Masters.

When the other Eternal Controllers learned that Black Ancestor was uncompromising, and that Black Decay Controllers couldn't help Black Ancestor, they immediately frowned one by one, not knowing what to do.

Many Eternal Masters are ready to leave the Origin Realm Sea next and go to the end of the Realm without clash with the Black Ancestor.

It's not a long-term solution, but it's the only way to do it for now.

After all, Black Ancestor didn't dare to leave the Origin Realm Sea.

......

With the passage of time, many weak Eternal Masters are preparing to flee to the Sea of Boundaries, and some forces have even relocated their headquarters to the Ends of the Realm, so that they are not afraid of Black Ancestor.

In this way, the situation has indeed been eased.

White Styx Mountain.

Hei Zu was a little depressed, he hadn't found any eternal controllers recently, these guys had all run to the end of the realm, and he didn't dare to enter the end of the realm, otherwise the primordial ancestor would be afraid to suppress him at the first time.

Although there are still some very weak first-level controllers, killing those controllers is almost of little help, they don't even have a grasp of the changes in the Dao, and there is no benefit in killing them.

"Let's practice first, it just so happens that there is a third path in the Origin Realm Sea, I can break the shackles and chains in my body, improve step by step, and I can also continue to improve my strength. Moreover, the changes in several of my paths are very close to a billion changes, and if I had relied on penance, I might have been able to master a billion changes completely. "

Hei Zu thought to himself.

There is still a big difference between approaching a billion variations and a real billion.

"However, it is almost impossible to grasp the billion changes of the Dao by relying on your own wry smile, no matter, let's leave it at that. See how much you can improve by breaking the chains, and then plan in detail. "

Black Ancestor muttered.

Subsequently, he began to collect some Cursed Black Stones and Life White Stones, and he also recruited some Eternal Masters who practiced Heaven Grabber, and the task of collecting them was given to him.

He only blessed them, and he didn't need to bother with it, and he could practice with peace of mind.

In this way, the situation in the Origin Realm Sea was temporarily stabilized.

And at the moment.

Ye Tian was also practicing in retreat, he was not worried about the affairs of the Black Ancestor, after all, the Black Ancestor could not threaten him.

At present, it is becoming more and more difficult to break the shackles and chains, and Ye Tian doesn't know when he will be able to break the next shackle chain.

Right now, he hoped that he could create a technique that surpassed the top-notch Origin Control Technique, and in that case, his strength could increase by leaps and bounds.

In addition, it depends on whether you are lucky to find a treasure that allows you to replicate the evolution of your talent.

However, Ye Tian felt that he was still trying to create a technique that surpassed the top origin control technique, which was more promising.

However, after contemplating it for a long time, Ye Tian found that it was too difficult to create a technique that surpassed the top Origin Control Technique.

As strong as the Black Ancestor, he only created the Great Nest of Darkness, and the Black Rotten Ruler only created an immortal spear.

They don't know how many years it took to create only one such skill.

Therefore, it was impossible for Ye Tian to easily create such a technique.

"Maybe I can be united with the Perfect Body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he was ready to use the Perfect Body as the foundation to create a skill that would match the Perfect Body, which could definitely surpass the top Origin Control Technique.

In the following years, Ye Tian went all out to comprehend and create, and used his perfect body to practice moves again and again.

The years are like traces, and 300 million river years have passed unconsciously.

this day.

Ye Tian was extremely excited, because he had finally created a technique, which surpassed the top Origin Control Technique and reached another level.

This move of his needs to be performed under the perfect body, and with the perfect body, he can control the countless changes in his body, and slash out a blow to form a blade of light.

He named this move the Ten Thousand Dao Blade!

"Beyond the top origin control technique, what level is this called, it might as well be called the perfect control technique!"

Ye Tian ordered.

After creating the perfect control technique Wandao Blade, Ye Tian's strength reached another level.

Right now, he felt that he should have the hope of inflicting heavy damage on the Black Ancestor, but he still wouldn't necessarily be able to kill him.

Subsequently.

Hundreds of millions of years have passed, and Ye Tian has cultivated the changes in the Dao of Space to infinitely close to a billion changes on this day.

In fact, a long time ago, many of his Dao changes had reached the level of nearly a billion kinds, but now they are infinitely close.

For example, the changes in the spatial path have mastered 99,999 kinds of changes, and only one change is needed to reach 100,000 kinds of changes.

At this time, Ye Tian suddenly felt that once he reached a billion changes, what changes would seem to happen?

In addition, there was only one left, and Ye Tian had some impulses in his heart to come out of it.

"Then enlighten it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, he frantically comprehended the changes in the Dao of Space, and he had the affinity of the Dao, so the efficiency of his comprehension far exceeded that of other eternal controllers, but even so, this last one was extremely difficult to comprehend.

Originally, Ye Tian felt that he would definitely be able to comprehend tens of millions of realm river years, but after comprehending hundreds of millions of realm river years, he still did not comprehend it.

However, he did not give up and continued to meditate.

Finally, after contemplating the 600 million realm river years, the billionth change of the Dao of Space was realized!
